name: minefield
description: Minefield — multiplayer minesweeper in real time

scripts.version:bump: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),cp=require('child_process'); const hash=cp.execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD').toString().trim(); fs.writeFileSync('public/version.json', JSON.stringify({version:hash},null,2)+'\n'); cp.execSync('git add public/version.json'); cp.execSync('git commit -m \"chore: bump version to '+hash+'\"'); console.log('Bumped and committed:', hash);"
